summary: Settings Hub new features testing completed. All 9 backend tests pass. All frontend UI features verified working correctly. New features: CustomerActivityRulesCard in Commercial Rules tab (active_days=30, at_risk_days=90, 6 signal checkboxes), GeneratedStampBuilder in Invoice Branding tab (shape, color, phrase, company name, city, reg number, TIN), SignaturePad with Upload/Draw method toggle, Generate SVG Preview button producing professional stamps.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Settings Hub new features complete. CustomerActivityRulesCard in Commercial Rules tab with active_days, at_risk_days, default_new_customer_status, and 6 signal checkboxes. GeneratedStampBuilder in Invoice Branding tab with stamp_shape, stamp_color, stamp_phrase, stamp_text_primary, stamp_text_secondary, stamp_registration_number, stamp_tax_number. SignaturePad with upload/pad method toggle. Generate SVG Preview button creates professional stamps with company logo.

GET /api/admin/settings-hub.details: Returns all settings including customer_activity_rules section with active_days=30, at_risk_days=90, signals object

GET /api/admin/settings/invoice-branding.details: Returns signature_method field (upload/pad) and all stamp fields

POST /api/admin/settings/invoice-brandin.details: Returns SVG for circle and square stamps with correct colors (blue, red, black)

9_tabs_render_correctly.details: All 9 tabs (Business Profile, Payment Details, Invoice Branding, Commercial Rules, Sales & Commissions, Affiliate & Referrals, Workflows & Vendors, Notifications, Launch Controls) render and are clickable

business_profile_tab.details: Shows Company Information and Document Numbering fields

commercial_rules_tab.details: Shows Core Commercials, Margin Rules, Customer Activity Rules card, and Promotions sections

customer_activity_rules_card.details: Shows Active Window (30 days), At Risk Window End (90 days), Default New Customer Status dropdown, and 6 signal checkboxes (orders, invoices, quotes, requests, sales_notes, account_logins)

invoice_branding_tab.details: Shows contact details, CFO fields, signature toggle with Upload/Draw method buttons, stamp toggle with GeneratedStampBuilder, CSS preview, and Generate SVG Preview button

signature_pad.details: SignaturePad with canvas, Clear button, Save Signature button. Upload/Draw method toggle works

generated_stamp_builder.details: Shows Stamp Shape (circle/square), Stamp Color (blue/red/black), Stamp Phrase, Company Legal Name, City/Country, Registration Number, TIN/Tax Number inputs

generate_svg_preview.details: Generates professional SVG stamp with company name in arc, city in arc, registration/TIN numbers, and Konekt logo in center

invoice_footer_preview.details: Shows Authorized By section with CFO name/title and Company Stamp section with generated SVG

save_all_settings.details: Save All Settings button persists data to backend

save_branding_settings.details: Save Branding Settings button persists invoice branding independently
